description: The line chart falsely implies a continuous trend or relationship between the disbursement values of unrelated political candidates, as if there is a meaningful progression from one candidate to the next. The connecting line suggests that the values rise and fall in a patterned sequence, when in reality these are discrete, independent data points with no inherent ordering or continuity. A reader might mistakenly interpret the shape of the line as indicating some underlying pattern or correlation among the candidates.
